mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMP_INS_REQ REQ
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RES.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO ORDER BY RES.IIR_UPDT_DT DESC, RES.IIR_RESULT_DT DESC, RES.IIR_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM IMP_INS_RESULT RES ) WHERE RN = 1 ) RES ON RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN IMP_INS_LOC LOC ON LOC.IIL_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CERT.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CERT.IIC_REQ_NO ORDER BY CERT.IIC_UPDT_DT DESC, CERT.IIC_CERT_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM IMP_INS_CERT CERT ) WHERE RN = 1 ) CERT ON CERT.IIC_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN IMP_DCLR DCLR ON REQ.IR_NO = DCLR.ID_IR_NO
LEFT JOIN IMP_RQST IR ON IR.IR_NO = REQ.IR_NO
LEFT JOIN OWNER OW ON OW.OWR_ID = IR.IR_OWR_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT IIRI_REQ_NO, MIN(IIRI_GOODS_NM) AS ITEM_NM, MIN(IIRI_HS_CD) AS HS_CODE FROM IMP_INS_REQ_ITEM GROUP BY IIRI_REQ_NO ) ITEM ON REQ.IIR_REQ_NO = ITEM.IIRI_REQ_NO
1 = 1
AND REQ.IIR_QRTN_OFFICER_ID = #{searchDTO.officerId}
AND REQ.IIR_REQ_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.reqNo} || '%'
AND NVL(OW.OWR_NM, DCLR.ID_IMPR_NM) LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.bizNm} || '%'
AND ITEM.ITEM_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.itemNm} || '%'
AND ITEM.HS_CODE LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.hsCode} || '%'
AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL
AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = #{searchDTO.iirResultCd}
AND NVL(RES.IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, 'QRTN_INPRG') = #{searchDTO.iirResultStatusCd}
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = 'CERT_WAIT'
AND ( REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD = 'CANCEL' OR CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = 'CERT_BLOCK' OR ( CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD IS NULL AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'FAIL' ) )
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'SUPP'
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = 'CERT_DONE'
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT /* IMP_INS_RESULT */ RES.IIR_NO, RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO, NVL(RES.IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID, REQ.IIR_QRTN_OFFICER_ID) AS IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID, NVL(RES.IIL_NO, LOC.IIL_NO) AS IIL_NO, NVL(RES.IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, 'QRTN_INPRG') AS IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, RES.IIR_RESULT_CD AS IIR_RESULT_CD, RES.IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_CD, RES.IIR_RESULT_CN, TO_CHAR(RES.IIR_RESULT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS IIR_RESULT_DT, TO_CHAR(RES.IIR_RESULT_REGIST_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS IIR_RESULT_REGIST_DT, TO_CHAR(RES.IIR_UPDT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS IIR_UPDT_DT,
/* IMP_INS_REQ */ REQ.IIR_REQ_NO AS REQ_NO, REQ.IR_NO AS APLY_NO, REQ.IIR_QRTN_INST_CD AS QRTN_INST_CD, REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD AS REQ_STATUS_CD, TO_CHAR(REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RPLY_DDLINE_DT,
/* IMP_INS_LOC + 창고 위치 */ LOC.IIL_REQ_NO AS LOC_REQ_NO, TO_CHAR(LOC.IIL_WIL_NO) AS LOC_WIL_NO, LOC.IIL_TY_CD AS LOC_TY_CD, TO_CHAR(LOC.IIL_PLAN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LOC_PLAN_DT,
NVL(WH.WH_NM, LOC.IIL_NM) AS LOC_NM, NVL(WH.WH_ZIP, LOC.IIL_ZIP) AS LOC_ZIP, NVL(WH.WH_ADRES, LOC.IIL_ADRES) AS LOC_ADRES, NVL(WH.WH_DETAIL_ADRES, LOC.IIL_DETAIL_ADRES) AS LOC_DETAIL_ADRES,
/* 화면 표시용 값 */ NVL(CERT.IIC_CERT_NO, REPLACE(REQ.IIR_REQ_NO, 'QI-', 'FQC-')) AS CERT_ISSUE_NO, CERT.IIC_TFG_NO AS CERT_TFG_NO, CASE WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'SUPP' THEN 'SUPP' WHEN REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' WHEN CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD IS NOT NULL THEN CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL THEN 'JUDGE_WAIT' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'PASS' THEN 'CERT_NOT_SAVED' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' ELSE 'JUDGE_WAIT' END AS CERT_ISSUE_STATUS,
REQ_STATUS_CC.CC_NM AS REQ_STATUS_NM, NVL(RESULT_STATUS_CC.CC_NM, '검역진행중') AS IIR_RESULT_STATUS_NM,
CASE WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL THEN '판정 대기' ELSE RESULT_CC.CC_NM END AS IIR_RESULT_NM,
FOLLOWUP_CC.CC_NM AS IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_NM,
CASE WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'SUPP' THEN '보완요청' WHEN REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN '발급 불가' WHEN CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_NM IS NOT NULL THEN CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_NM WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL THEN '판정 대기' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'PASS' THEN '발급정보 미저장' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN '발급 불가' ELSE '판정 대기' END AS CERT_ISSUE_STATUS_NM, '검역합격증명서' AS DOC_TYPE_NM, OFC.OFFICER_NM AS OFFICER_NM,
/* 업체명 / 품목명 / HS CODE */ NVL(OW.OWR_NM, DCLR.ID_IMPR_NM) AS BIZ_NM, ITEM.ITEM_NM AS ITEM_NM, ITEM.HS_CODE AS HS_CODE
FROM IMP_INS_REQ REQ
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RES.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO ORDER BY RES.IIR_UPDT_DT DESC, RES.IIR_RESULT_DT DESC, RES.IIR_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM IMP_INS_RESULT RES ) WHERE RN = 1 ) RES ON RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN IMP_INS_LOC LOC ON LOC.IIL_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON LOC.IIL_WIL_NO = WIL.WIL_NO
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO = WZ.WZ_NO
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WH ON WZ.WZ_WH_NO = WH.WH_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CERT.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CERT.IIC_REQ_NO ORDER BY CERT.IIC_UPDT_DT DESC, CERT.IIC_CERT_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM IMP_INS_CERT CERT ) WHERE RN = 1 ) CERT ON CERT.IIC_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN OFFICER OFC ON OFC.OFFICER_ID = NVL( CERT.IIC_ISSUE_OFFICER_ID, NVL(RES.IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID, REQ.IIR_QRTN_OFFICER_ID) )
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE REQ_STATUS_CC ON REQ_STATUS_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_REQ_STATUS' AND REQ_STATUS_CC.CC_CD = REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE RESULT_STATUS_CC ON RESULT_STATUS_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_RESULT_STATUS' AND RESULT_STATUS_CC.CC_CD = NVL(RES.IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, 'QRTN_INPRG')
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE RESULT_CC ON RESULT_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_RESULT_CD' AND RESULT_CC.CC_CD = RES.IIR_RESULT_CD
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE FOLLOWUP_CC ON FOLLOWUP_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_FOLLOWUP_CD' AND FOLLOWUP_CC.CC_CD = RES.IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_CD
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE CERT_STATUS_CC ON CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_CERT_STATUS' AND CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_CD = CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD
LEFT JOIN IMP_DCLR DCLR ON REQ.IR_NO = DCLR.ID_IR_NO
LEFT JOIN IMP_RQST IR ON IR.IR_NO = REQ.IR_NO
LEFT JOIN OWNER OW ON OW.OWR_ID = IR.IR_OWR_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT IIRI_REQ_NO, MIN(IIRI_GOODS_NM) AS ITEM_NM, MIN(IIRI_HS_CD) AS HS_CODE FROM IMP_INS_REQ_ITEM GROUP BY IIRI_REQ_NO ) ITEM ON REQ.IIR_REQ_NO = ITEM.IIRI_REQ_NO
1 = 1
AND REQ.IIR_QRTN_OFFICER_ID = #{searchDTO.officerId}
AND REQ.IIR_REQ_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.reqNo} || '%'
AND NVL(OW.OWR_NM, DCLR.ID_IMPR_NM) LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.bizNm} || '%'
AND ITEM.ITEM_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.itemNm} || '%'
AND ITEM.HS_CODE LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.hsCode} || '%'
AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL
AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = #{searchDTO.iirResultCd}
AND NVL(RES.IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, 'QRTN_INPRG') = #{searchDTO.iirResultStatusCd}
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = 'CERT_WAIT'
AND ( REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD = 'CANCEL' OR CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = 'CERT_BLOCK' OR ( CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD IS NULL AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'FAIL' ) )
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'SUPP'
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = 'CERT_DONE'
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL
ORDER BY NVL(RES.IIR_RESULT_DT, REQ.IIR_DT) DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{startRow}

SELECT /* ========================= IMP_INS_RESULT 검역 결과 ========================= */ RES.IIR_NO, RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO, NVL(RES.IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID, REQ.IIR_QRTN_OFFICER_ID) AS IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID, NVL(RES.IIL_NO, LOC.IIL_NO) AS IIL_NO, NVL(RES.IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, 'QRTN_INPRG') AS IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, RES.IIR_RESULT_CD AS IIR_RESULT_CD, RES.IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_CD, RES.IIR_RESULT_CN, TO_CHAR(RES.IIR_RESULT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS IIR_RESULT_DT, TO_CHAR(RES.IIR_RESULT_REGIST_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS IIR_RESULT_REGIST_DT, TO_CHAR(RES.IIR_UPDT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS IIR_UPDT_DT,
/* ========================= IMP_INS_REQ 검역 요청 ========================= */ REQ.IIR_REQ_NO AS REQ_NO, REQ.IR_NO AS APLY_NO, REQ.IIR_QRTN_INST_CD AS QRTN_INST_CD, REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD AS REQ_STATUS_CD, TO_CHAR(REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RPLY_DDLINE_DT,
/* ========================= IMP_INS_LOC 검역 위치 ========================= */ LOC.IIL_REQ_NO AS LOC_REQ_NO, TO_CHAR(LOC.IIL_WIL_NO) AS LOC_WIL_NO, LOC.IIL_TY_CD AS LOC_TY_CD, NVL(WH.WH_NM, LOC.IIL_NM) AS LOC_NM, NVL(WH.WH_ZIP, LOC.IIL_ZIP) AS LOC_ZIP, NVL(WH.WH_ADRES, LOC.IIL_ADRES) AS LOC_ADRES, NVL(WH.WH_DETAIL_ADRES, LOC.IIL_DETAIL_ADRES) AS LOC_DETAIL_ADRES, TO_CHAR(LOC.IIL_PLAN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LOC_PLAN_DT,
/* ========================= 증명서 표시 정보 ========================= */ NVL(CERT.IIC_CERT_NO, REPLACE(REQ.IIR_REQ_NO, 'QI-', 'FQC-')) AS CERT_ISSUE_NO, CERT.IIC_TFG_NO AS CERT_TFG_NO,
CASE WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'SUPP' THEN 'SUPP' WHEN REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' WHEN CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD IS NOT NULL THEN CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL THEN 'JUDGE_WAIT' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'PASS' THEN 'CERT_NOT_SAVED' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' ELSE 'JUDGE_WAIT' END AS CERT_ISSUE_STATUS,
REQ_STATUS_CC.CC_NM AS REQ_STATUS_NM, NVL(RESULT_STATUS_CC.CC_NM, '검역진행중') AS IIR_RESULT_STATUS_NM,
CASE WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL THEN '판정 대기' ELSE RESULT_CC.CC_NM END AS IIR_RESULT_NM,
FOLLOWUP_CC.CC_NM AS IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_NM,
CASE WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'SUPP' THEN '보완요청' WHEN REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN '발급 불가' WHEN CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_NM IS NOT NULL THEN CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_NM WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL THEN '판정 대기' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'PASS' THEN '발급정보 미저장' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN '발급 불가' ELSE '판정 대기' END AS CERT_ISSUE_STATUS_NM,
'검역합격증명서' AS DOC_TYPE_NM, OFC.OFFICER_NM AS OFFICER_NM,
/* ========================= 목록 화면 표시용 정보 ========================= */ NVL(OW.OWR_NM, DCLR.ID_IMPR_NM) AS BIZ_NM, ITEM.ITEM_NM AS ITEM_NM, ITEM.HS_CODE AS HS_CODE,
DCLR.ID_TAXPYR_IDNT_NO AS BIZ_NO, DCLR.ID_DCLRNT_NM AS APPLICANT_NAME, DCLR.ID_DCLRNT_TELNO AS APPLICANT_TEL, DCLR.ID_TAXPYR_ZIP AS TAXPAYER_ZIP, DCLR.ID_TAXPYR_ADDR AS TAXPAYER_ADDR, DCLR.ID_TAXPYR_DTL_ADDR AS TAXPAYER_DTL_ADDR, DCLR.ID_CGO_MNG_NO AS CARGO_NO, DCLR.ID_MBL_NO AS BL_NO, DCLR.ID_ARVL_YMD AS ARRIVAL_DATE, DCLR.ID_SHIPOUT_CNTRY_CD AS EXPORT_COUNTRY_CD, DCLR.ID_OVRSS_NM AS OVERSEAS_NM, DCLR.ID_TOT_PKG_CNT AS TOTAL_PKG_CNT, DCLR.ID_TOT_WT AS TOTAL_WEIGHT
FROM IMP_INS_REQ REQ
/* 최신 검역결과 1건 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RES.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO ORDER BY RES.IIR_UPDT_DT DESC, RES.IIR_RESULT_DT DESC, RES.IIR_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM IMP_INS_RESULT RES ) WHERE RN = 1 ) RES ON RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN IMP_INS_LOC LOC ON LOC.IIL_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON LOC.IIL_WIL_NO = WIL.WIL_NO
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO = WZ.WZ_NO
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WH ON WZ.WZ_WH_NO = WH.WH_NO
/* 최신 증명서 1건 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CERT.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CERT.IIC_REQ_NO ORDER BY CERT.IIC_UPDT_DT DESC, CERT.IIC_CERT_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM IMP_INS_CERT CERT ) WHERE RN = 1 ) CERT ON CERT.IIC_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN OFFICER OFC ON OFC.OFFICER_ID = NVL( CERT.IIC_ISSUE_OFFICER_ID, NVL(RES.IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID, REQ.IIR_QRTN_OFFICER_ID) )
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE REQ_STATUS_CC ON REQ_STATUS_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_REQ_STATUS' AND REQ_STATUS_CC.CC_CD = REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE RESULT_STATUS_CC ON RESULT_STATUS_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_RESULT_STATUS' AND RESULT_STATUS_CC.CC_CD = NVL(RES.IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, 'QRTN_INPRG')
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE RESULT_CC ON RESULT_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_RESULT_CD' AND RESULT_CC.CC_CD = RES.IIR_RESULT_CD
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE FOLLOWUP_CC ON FOLLOWUP_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_FOLLOWUP_CD' AND FOLLOWUP_CC.CC_CD = RES.IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_CD
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE CERT_STATUS_CC ON CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_CERT_STATUS' AND CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_CD = CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD
LEFT JOIN IMP_DCLR DCLR ON REQ.IR_NO = DCLR.ID_IR_NO
LEFT JOIN IMP_RQST IR ON IR.IR_NO = REQ.IR_NO
LEFT JOIN OWNER OW ON OW.OWR_ID = IR.IR_OWR_ID
/* 대표 품목 1건 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT IIRI_REQ_NO, MIN(IIRI_GOODS_NM) AS ITEM_NM, MIN(IIRI_HS_CD) AS HS_CODE FROM IMP_INS_REQ_ITEM GROUP BY IIRI_REQ_NO ) ITEM ON REQ.IIR_REQ_NO = ITEM.IIRI_REQ_NO
1 = 1
AND REQ.IIR_QRTN_OFFICER_ID = #{officerId}
AND REQ.IIR_REQ_NO LIKE '%' || #{reqNo} || '%'
AND NVL(OW.OWR_NM, DCLR.ID_IMPR_NM) LIKE '%' || #{bizNm} || '%'
AND ITEM.ITEM_NM LIKE '%' || #{itemNm} || '%'
AND ITEM.HS_CODE LIKE '%' || #{hsCode} || '%'
AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL
AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = #{iirResultCd}
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = 'CERT_WAIT'
AND ( REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD = 'CANCEL' OR CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = 'CERT_BLOCK' OR ( CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD IS NULL AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'FAIL' ) )
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'SUPP'
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = 'CERT_DONE'
AND REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD != 'CANCEL' AND RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL
ORDER BY NVL(RES.IIR_RESULT_DT, REQ.IIR_DT) DESC

SELECT /* IMP_INS_RESULT */ RES.IIR_NO, RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO, NVL(RES.IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID, REQ.IIR_QRTN_OFFICER_ID) AS IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID, NVL(RES.IIL_NO, LOC.IIL_NO) AS IIL_NO, NVL(RES.IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, 'QRTN_INPRG') AS IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, RES.IIR_RESULT_CD AS IIR_RESULT_CD, RES.IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_CD, RES.IIR_RESULT_CN, TO_CHAR(RES.IIR_RESULT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS IIR_RESULT_DT, TO_CHAR(RES.IIR_RESULT_REGIST_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS IIR_RESULT_REGIST_DT, TO_CHAR(RES.IIR_UPDT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS IIR_UPDT_DT,
/* IMP_INS_REQ */ REQ.IIR_REQ_NO AS REQ_NO, REQ.IR_NO AS APLY_NO,
/* * 보완요청 수신자 관세사 ID * SUPP_RQST.RECEIVER_ID에 들어갈 값 */ IR.IR_BROKER_ID AS IR_BROKER_ID,
REQ.IIR_QRTN_INST_CD AS QRTN_INST_CD, REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD AS REQ_STATUS_CD, TO_CHAR(REQ.IIR_RPLY_DDLINE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RPLY_DDLINE_DT, TO_CHAR(REQ.IIR_CMPL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CMPL_DT,
/* IMP_INS_LOC + 창고 위치 */ LOC.IIL_REQ_NO AS LOC_REQ_NO, TO_CHAR(LOC.IIL_WIL_NO) AS LOC_WIL_NO, LOC.IIL_TY_CD AS LOC_TY_CD, TO_CHAR(LOC.IIL_PLAN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LOC_PLAN_DT,
NVL(WH.WH_NM, LOC.IIL_NM) AS LOC_NM, NVL(WH.WH_ZIP, LOC.IIL_ZIP) AS LOC_ZIP, NVL(WH.WH_ADRES, LOC.IIL_ADRES) AS LOC_ADRES, NVL(WH.WH_DETAIL_ADRES, LOC.IIL_DETAIL_ADRES) AS LOC_DETAIL_ADRES,
/* 화면 표시용 값 */ NVL(CERT.IIC_CERT_NO, REPLACE(REQ.IIR_REQ_NO, 'QI-', 'FQC-')) AS CERT_ISSUE_NO, CERT.IIC_TFG_NO AS CERT_TFG_NO, CASE WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'SUPP' THEN 'SUPP' WHEN REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' WHEN CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD IS NOT NULL THEN CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL THEN 'JUDGE_WAIT' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'PASS' THEN 'CERT_NOT_SAVED' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' ELSE 'JUDGE_WAIT' END AS CERT_ISSUE_STATUS,
REQ_STATUS_CC.CC_NM AS REQ_STATUS_NM, NVL(RESULT_STATUS_CC.CC_NM, '검역진행중') AS IIR_RESULT_STATUS_NM,
CASE WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL THEN '판정 대기' ELSE RESULT_CC.CC_NM END AS IIR_RESULT_NM,
FOLLOWUP_CC.CC_NM AS IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_NM,
CASE WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'SUPP' THEN '보완요청' WHEN REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN '발급 불가' WHEN CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_NM IS NOT NULL THEN CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_NM WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD IS NULL THEN '판정 대기' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'PASS' THEN '발급정보 미저장' WHEN RES.IIR_RESULT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN '발급 불가' ELSE '판정 대기' END AS CERT_ISSUE_STATUS_NM,
'검역합격증명서' AS DOC_TYPE_NM, OFC.OFFICER_NM AS OFFICER_NM,
/* 상세 화면 표시용 추가 정보 */ NVL(OW.OWR_NM, DCLR.ID_IMPR_NM) AS IMPORTER_NM, NVL(OW.OWR_NM, DCLR.ID_IMPR_NM) AS BIZ_NM, NVL(QITEM.ITEM_NM, ITEM.ITEM_NM) AS ITEM_NM, NVL(QITEM.HS_CODE, ITEM.HS_CODE) AS HS_CODE,
/* 신청인 / 수입자 정보 */ NVL(OW.OWR_BIZRNO, DCLR.ID_TAXPYR_IDNT_NO) AS BIZ_NO, BR.BROKER_NM AS APPLICANT_NAME, BR.BROKER_TELNO AS APPLICANT_TEL, BR.BROKER_OFFICE_NM AS APPLICANT_BIZ, NVL(OW.OWR_TELNO, DCLR.ID_DCLRNT_TELNO) AS IMPORTER_TEL,
/* 납세자 / 주소 정보 */ NVL(OW.OWR_ZIP, DCLR.ID_TAXPYR_ZIP) AS TAXPAYER_ZIP, NVL(OW.OWR_ADRES, DCLR.ID_TAXPYR_ADDR) AS TAXPAYER_ADDR, NVL(OW.OWR_DETAIL_ADRES, DCLR.ID_TAXPYR_DTL_ADDR) AS TAXPAYER_DTL_ADDR,
/* 화물 / 통관 정보 */ NVL(REQ.IIR_TRANSPORT_NM, DCLR.ID_TRNSP_MN_CD) AS TRANSPORT_NM, NVL(IR.IR_BL_AWB_NO, DCLR.ID_MBL_NO) AS BL_NO,
COALESCE( TO_CHAR(REQ.IIR_ARRV_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), CASE WHEN LENGTH(DCLR.ID_ARVL_YMD) = 8 THEN SUBSTR(DCLR.ID_ARVL_YMD, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(DCLR.ID_ARVL_YMD, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(DCLR.ID_ARVL_YMD, 7, 2) ELSE DCLR.ID_ARVL_YMD END, CASE WHEN LENGTH(IR.IR_ARRV_SCHD_YMD) = 8 THEN SUBSTR(IR.IR_ARRV_SCHD_YMD, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(IR.IR_ARRV_SCHD_YMD, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(IR.IR_ARRV_SCHD_YMD, 7, 2) ELSE IR.IR_ARRV_SCHD_YMD END ) AS ARRIVAL_DATE,
NVL(EXC.COUNTRY_NM_KR, NVL(REQ.IIR_EXPORT_COUNTRY_CD, DCLR.ID_SHIPOUT_CNTRY_CD)) AS EXPORT_COUNTRY_CD, DCLR.ID_OVRSS_NM AS OVERSEAS_NM,
NVL(QITEM.ORIGIN_COUNTRY_CD, ITEM.ORIGIN_COUNTRY_CD) AS ORIGIN_COUNTRY_CD, TO_CHAR(NVL(QITEM.ITEM_QTY, ITEM.ITEM_QTY)) AS ITEM_QTY, NVL(QITEM.ITEM_QTY_UNIT_CD, ITEM.ITEM_QTY_UNIT_CD) AS ITEM_QTY_UNIT_CD,
TO_CHAR( NVL( NVL(QITEM.ITEM_NET_WT, ITEM.ITEM_NET_WT), NVL(REQ.IIR_TOTAL_WEIGHT, DCLR.ID_TOT_WT) ) ) AS TOTAL_WEIGHT
FROM IMP_INS_REQ REQ
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RES.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO ORDER BY RES.IIR_UPDT_DT DESC, RES.IIR_RESULT_DT DESC, RES.IIR_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM IMP_INS_RESULT RES ) WHERE RN = 1 ) RES ON RES.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN IMP_INS_LOC LOC ON LOC.IIL_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON LOC.IIL_WIL_NO = WIL.WIL_NO
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO = WZ.WZ_NO
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WH ON WZ.WZ_WH_NO = WH.WH_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CERT.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CERT.IIC_REQ_NO ORDER BY CERT.IIC_UPDT_DT DESC, CERT.IIC_CERT_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM IMP_INS_CERT CERT ) WHERE RN = 1 ) CERT ON CERT.IIC_REQ_NO = REQ.IIR_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN OFFICER OFC ON OFC.OFFICER_ID = NVL( CERT.IIC_ISSUE_OFFICER_ID, NVL(RES.IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID, REQ.IIR_QRTN_OFFICER_ID) )
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE REQ_STATUS_CC ON REQ_STATUS_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_REQ_STATUS' AND REQ_STATUS_CC.CC_CD = REQ.IIR_STATUS_CD
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE RESULT_STATUS_CC ON RESULT_STATUS_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_RESULT_STATUS' AND RESULT_STATUS_CC.CC_CD = NVL(RES.IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, 'QRTN_INPRG')
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE RESULT_CC ON RESULT_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_RESULT_CD' AND RESULT_CC.CC_CD = RES.IIR_RESULT_CD
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE FOLLOWUP_CC ON FOLLOWUP_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_FOLLOWUP_CD' AND FOLLOWUP_CC.CC_CD = RES.IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_CD
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE CERT_STATUS_CC ON CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'QRTN_CERT_STATUS' AND CERT_STATUS_CC.CC_CD = CERT.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD
LEFT JOIN IMP_DCLR DCLR ON REQ.IR_NO = DCLR.ID_IR_NO
LEFT JOIN IMP_RQST IR ON IR.IR_NO = REQ.IR_NO
LEFT JOIN OWNER OW ON OW.OWR_ID = IR.IR_OWR_ID
LEFT JOIN BROKER BR ON BR.BROKER_ID = IR.IR_BROKER_ID
LEFT JOIN COUNTRY EXC ON EXC.COUNTRY_CD = NVL(REQ.IIR_EXPORT_COUNTRY_CD, DCLR.ID_SHIPOUT_CNTRY_CD)
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT IIRI_REQ_NO, MIN(IIRI_GOODS_NM) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IIRI_SN) AS ITEM_NM, MIN(IIRI_HS_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IIRI_SN) AS HS_CODE, MIN(IIRI_QTY) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IIRI_SN) AS ITEM_QTY, MIN(IIRI_QTY_UNIT_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IIRI_SN) AS ITEM_QTY_UNIT_CD, MIN(IIRI_NET_WEIGHT) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IIRI_SN) AS ITEM_NET_WT, MIN(IIRI_ORIGIN_COUNTRY_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IIRI_SN) AS ORIGIN_COUNTRY_CD FROM IMP_INS_REQ_ITEM GROUP BY IIRI_REQ_NO ) QITEM ON REQ.IIR_REQ_NO = QITEM.IIRI_REQ_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT IDI_IR_NO, MIN(IDI_DCLR_GDSNM) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IDI_SN) AS ITEM_NM, MIN(IDI_HS_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IDI_SN) AS HS_CODE, MIN(IDI_QTY) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IDI_SN) AS ITEM_QTY, MIN(IDI_QTY_UNIT_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IDI_SN) AS ITEM_QTY_UNIT_CD, MIN(IDI_NET_WT) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IDI_SN) AS ITEM_NET_WT, MIN(IDI_ORGN_CNTRY_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY IDI_SN) AS ORIGIN_COUNTRY_CD FROM IMP_DCLR_ITEM GROUP BY IDI_IR_NO ) ITEM ON ITEM.IDI_IR_NO = REQ.IR_NO
WHERE REQ.IIR_REQ_NO = #{reqNo} AND REQ.IIR_QRTN_OFFICER_ID = #{officerId}

SELECT ITEM.IIRI_SN AS ITEM_SN, ITEM.IIRI_GOODS_NM AS ITEM_NM, ITEM.IIRI_HS_CD AS HS_CODE, TO_CHAR(ITEM.IIRI_QTY) AS ITEM_QTY, ITEM.IIRI_QTY_UNIT_CD AS ITEM_QTY_UNIT_CD, TO_CHAR(ITEM.IIRI_NET_WEIGHT) AS ITEM_NET_WT, ITEM.IIRI_ORIGIN_COUNTRY_CD AS ITEM_ORIGIN_CD, NULL AS ITEM_JUDGE_RESULT
FROM IMP_INS_REQ_ITEM ITEM
WHERE ITEM.IIRI_REQ_NO = #{reqNo}
ORDER BY ITEM.IIRI_SN
mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO IMP_INS_CERT C USING ( SELECT #{reqNo} AS IIC_REQ_NO FROM DUAL ) S ON (C.IIC_REQ_NO = S.IIC_REQ_NO)
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET C.IIC_CERT_NO = #{certIssueNo}, C.IIC_RESULT_NO = #{iirNo}, C.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = 'CERT_DONE', C.IIC_ISSUE_OFFICER_ID = #{officerId}, C.IIC_DOC_TYPE_CD = 'QRTN_PASS_CERT', C.IIC_TFG_NO = NVL(#{certTfgNo}, C.IIC_TFG_NO), C.IIC_ISSUE_DT = SYSDATE, C.IIC_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( IIC_CERT_NO, IIC_RESULT_NO, IIC_REQ_NO, IIC_ISSUE_OFFICER_ID, IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD, IIC_DOC_TYPE_CD, IIC_TFG_NO, IIC_ISSUE_DT, IIC_REGIST_DT, IIC_UPDT_DT ) VALUES ( #{certIssueNo}, #{iirNo}, #{reqNo}, #{officerId}, 'CERT_DONE', 'QRTN_PASS_CERT', #{certTfgNo}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO IMP_INS_CERT C USING ( SELECT #{reqNo} AS IIC_REQ_NO FROM DUAL ) S ON (C.IIC_REQ_NO = S.IIC_REQ_NO)
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET C.IIC_CERT_NO = #{certIssueNo}, C.IIC_RESULT_NO = #{iirNo}, C.IIC_ISSUE_OFFICER_ID = #{officerId}, C.IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD = CASE WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'PASS' THEN 'CERT_WAIT' WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'FAIL' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'SUPP' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' ELSE 'CERT_BLOCK' END, C.IIC_DOC_TYPE_CD = 'QRTN_PASS_CERT', C.IIC_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( IIC_CERT_NO, IIC_RESULT_NO, IIC_REQ_NO, IIC_ISSUE_OFFICER_ID, IIC_ISSUE_STATUS_CD, IIC_DOC_TYPE_CD, IIC_ISSUE_DT, IIC_REGIST_DT, IIC_UPDT_DT ) VALUES ( #{certIssueNo}, #{iirNo}, #{reqNo}, #{officerId}, CASE WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'PASS' THEN 'CERT_WAIT' WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'FAIL' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'SUPP' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' ELSE 'CERT_BLOCK' END, 'QRTN_PASS_CERT', SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

SELECT NVL( ( SELECT IIR_NO FROM ( SELECT IIR_NO FROM IMP_INS_RESULT WHERE IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO = #{reqNo} ORDER BY IIR_UPDT_DT DESC, IIR_RESULT_DT DESC, IIR_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ), 'IIR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(SEQ_IMP_INS_RESULT.NEXTVAL, 4, '0') ) FROM DUAL
MERGE INTO IMP_INS_RESULT R USING ( SELECT #{reqNo} AS REQ_NO FROM DUAL ) S ON ( R.IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO = S.REQ_NO )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET R.IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID = #{officerId}, R.IIL_NO = #{iilNo}, R.IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD = CASE WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'SUPP' THEN 'QRTN_INPRG' ELSE 'QRTN_CMPL' END, R.IIR_RESULT_CD = #{judgeResult}, R.IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_CD = CASE WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'PASS' THEN 'CERT_TARGET' WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'FAIL' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'SUPP' THEN 'SUPP_NEED' ELSE NULL END, R.IIR_RESULT_CN = #{iirResultCn}, R.IIR_RESULT_DT = SYSDATE, R.IIR_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( IIR_NO, IIR_IMP_INS_REQ_NO, IIR_RSLT_OFFICER_ID, IIL_NO, IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD, IIR_RESULT_CD, IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_CD, IIR_RESULT_CN, IIR_RESULT_DT, IIR_RESULT_REGIST_DT, IIR_UPDT_DT ) VALUES ( #{iirNo}, #{reqNo}, #{officerId}, #{iilNo}, CASE WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'SUPP' THEN 'QRTN_INPRG' ELSE 'QRTN_CMPL' END, #{judgeResult}, CASE WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'PASS' THEN 'CERT_TARGET' WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'FAIL' THEN 'CERT_BLOCK' WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'SUPP' THEN 'SUPP_NEED' ELSE NULL END, #{iirResultCn}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE IMP_INS_REQ SET IIR_STATUS_CD = CASE WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'SUPP' THEN 'INPRG' ELSE 'CMPL' END, IIR_CMPL_DT = CASE WHEN #{judgeResult} = 'SUPP' THEN IIR_CMPL_DT ELSE NVL(IIR_CMPL_DT, SYSDATE) END, IIR_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE WHERE IIR_REQ_NO = #{reqNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'SR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(SEQ_SUPP_RQST.NEXTVAL, 4, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SUPP_RQST ( SR_NO, SR_REF_BIZ_CD, SR_REF_NO, SENDER_ID, SENDER_TY_CD, RECEIVER_ID, RECEIVER_TY_CD, SR_STATUS_CD, SR_REQ_DT, SR_SUBMIT_DT, SR_APPR_DT, SR_REQ_CN, SR_SUBMIT_CN ) VALUES ( #{srNo}, #{refBizCd}, #{reqNo}, #{officerId}, 'OFFICER', #{receiverId}, #{receiverTyCd}, 'REQ', SYSDATE, NULL, NULL, #{suppReqCn}, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE IMP_INS_RESULT SET IIR_RESULT_CD = 'SUPP', IIR_RESULT_STATUS_CD = 'QRTN_INPRG', IIR_RESULT_FOLLOWUP_CD = 'SUPP_NEED', IIR_RESULT_CN = #{suppReqCn}, IIR_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE WHERE IIR_NO = #{iirNo}
mapper.select: SELECT SR_NO AS srNo, SR_REF_BIZ_CD AS srRefBizCd, SR_REF_NO AS srRefNo, SENDER_ID AS senderId, SENDER_TY_CD AS senderTyCd, RECEIVER_ID AS receiverId, RECEIVER_TY_CD AS receiverTyCd, SR_STATUS_CD AS srStatusCd, SR_REQ_DT AS srReqDt, SR_SUBMIT_DT AS srSubmitDt, SR_APPR_DT AS srApprDt, SR_REQ_CN AS srReqCn, SR_SUBMIT_CN AS srSubmitCn FROM ( SELECT SR_NO, SR_REF_BIZ_CD, SR_REF_NO, SENDER_ID, SENDER_TY_CD, RECEIVER_ID, RECEIVER_TY_CD, SR_STATUS_CD, SR_REQ_DT, SR_SUBMIT_DT, SR_APPR_DT, SR_REQ_CN, SR_SUBMIT_CN FROM SUPP_RQST WHERE SR_REF_BIZ_CD = 'IMP_INS_REQ' AND SR_REF_NO = #{reqNo} ORDER BY SR_REQ_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE SUPP_RQST SET SR_STATUS_CD = 'APR', SR_APPR_DT = SYSDATE WHERE SR_NO = #{srNo} AND SR_STATUS_CD = 'SUB'
